subject: Two reasons:

body:
Our campaign is close to reaching three million contributions. If we're able to hit this milestone before the Iowa caucuses, we'll send a powerful message to people all across the country that... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a6ee/45c30650/1e361cd9b/66fef52d/175030169/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Your first donation couldn't come at a better time than right now. Here's why:

1. Our campaign is close to reaching **three million contributions**. If we're able to hit this milestone before the Iowa caucuses, we'll send a powerful message to people all across the country that there is a grassroots movement behind Elizabeth's vision for big, structural change.
2. The Iowa caucuses are just two weeks away, and we're keeping close track of every single contribution we receive to help determine how much we can invest in our important advertising, organizing, and voter turnout programs right now. **And we're slightly behind where we'd like to be today, which means we need to pick up the pace.**

**When you chip in $2 or anything you can right now, you're bringing our campaign one step closer to our goal of three million contributions -- and you're also helping make sure we'll have all the resources we need to help Elizabeth win.**

**[Can you pitch in today? Your first contribution right now will make a real impact for Elizabeth and this grassroots movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a6ee/45c30650/1e361cd9b/66fef52e/175030169/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xRUZfM01DX0dSTV9UXzIwMjAwMTIwX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1EF_3MC_GRM_T_20200120_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: MJ Hegar
subject: time to bring real Texas values to D.C.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
By defeating Senator Cornyn, Texans can send a message that it's time for a government that works for all of us, not just special interests.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a03/1537735213/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

This is going to be a historic election. Texas is the nation's largest battleground state, and by defeating a nearly 20-year incumbent who's propped up by special interest cash, we can send a strong message that Texans have _had it_ with the corruption and dysfunction in Washington.

Thanks to this grassroots team, **we're building a movement to WIN** \-- _The Washington Post_ even called Texas' Senate seat one of the top 10 "most likely to flip!" But Senator Cornyn's deep pockets will make sustaining our momentum a challenge: He has nearly _$11 million in the bank._

**And since I'm not taking money from corporate PACs, I'm counting on your help to beat him.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a01/1537735213/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200120.3nd__773__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a07/1537735213/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200120.3nd__773__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a05/1537735213/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200120.3nd__773__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a7b/1537735213/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200120.3nd__773__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a7a/1537735213/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200120.3nd__773__")**
Listen, I've never been afraid to fight for what's right. From flying rescue missions in Afghanistan to taking on the government to open ground combat jobs to women. That's why I decided to challenge Senator Cornyn -- because he hasn't done right by Texans.

I intend to run this race the right way, too. That means funding my campaign with grassroots donations from hard-working folks like you who just wish their government would look out for their families for a change -- the same people I will fight for in the Senate.

**But Senator Cornyn's cash is nothing to sneeze at, and we need to keep hitting our grassroots goals if we're going to beat him and his special interest supporters.[So Peter, please pitch in whatever you can to help us defeat Senator Cornyn!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a79/1537735213/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200120.3nd__773__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,
MJ
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890730/7f51f7bc/4aac6c4c/4ef00a79/1537735213/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc3MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200120.3nd__773__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

subject: Complete Your Reservation Today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TINA RAMIREZ, INC
body:

| | | Really Important You See This Friend, When I announced my campaign, I made you a promise: _**I'll FIGHT to be a voice for the unborn, for religious freedom for all, and to always promote limited government**_. Our district desperately needs new representation — but I simply cannot win this election without the strong support of conservatives like you. We're over halfway through the month of January, and the clock is quickly counting down to our 2020 Convention. _With your support, I am 100 percent certain our campaign will be a winning one come November_ — **but I need you to sign up as a 2020 Convention Delegate TODAY**. _**If I Can Count You On My Team, Will You Fill Out The Form Below?**_ Thank you for all that you do! \-- Tina
---
\---------- Forwarded message --------- **From** : Team Ramirez
**Date** : Jan 2, 2020
**Subject** : 2020 Convention Update Friend, As someone who has spent their life traveling the world fighting for human rights and religious freedom, I have seen firsthand the effects of totalitarian government — _and I have made it my personal mission to steer our nation off the path toward Socialism_. **Our district desperately needs conservative representation and I promise to be a steadfast voice for the unborn, to fight for religious freedom, and to _ALWAYS_ promote limited government.** Today, I am asking for your help — **I need _YOU_ to help Flip The Seventh by joining my campaign as a 2020 Convention Delegate!** Together, _there’s no doubt we can send Abigail Spanberger into early retirement_ and _bring a fresh conservative perspective to Washington_! Tina Ramirez
Candidate for Congress
VA-07

[Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-njuvld-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvld-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,**Nancy Pelosi** took her shot, **Adam Schiff **got to play to the cameras, and the Democrats' base got to do what they do best: **protest and complain.** But the Senate (and the Constitution) still have the final say on impeachment \-- **and this November, so will the voters. **Are you with President Trump? Will you join me in defending him in Washington? _Or are you content to let the Democrats out-raise and out-work us on impeachment?_ [Defend Trump - Join Fitz](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvld-ahkdjtlkr-y/) For all their crocodile tears about seriousness and how impeachment "had to be done," **the Democrats are cashing in on this shameful moment. ****Nancy Pelosi's DCCC, the main group that will be targeting me this November sent this tweet:** The month they impeached the president, dragging our country through the mud, "just so happened" to be their biggest month of fundraising, and the best December in their history. Sadly, that puts us in a position to play catch-up. We can't let the other side have the final say on impeachment... we need to match them person for person, and dollar for dollar! Please, take a moment and support our campaign to keep this district in Republican hands -- and show the impeachment-first Democrats that Wisconsin is not for sale!Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S., Will you help me? Join my campaign to fight back against Nancy Pelosi and her impeachment witch hunt with a contribution of [$5, $10, $25, or even $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-njuvld-ahkdjtlkr-j/)! Thanks - Fitz

name: Team Lipinski
subject: Quick update from the field
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Peter:
Dan’s campaign for re-election to Congress has shifted into high gear and we have been working across all areas of IL03 to share Dan’s message as a commonsense problem solver who delivers solutions, not slogans.
JOIN DAN FOR A BEER
Dan is having a Happy Hour and meet and greet on Wednesday, January 22nd, and he wants you to attend. Please join us for what should be a fun event while supporting Dan’s re-election campaign!
Please see below for more details, and then RSVP by clicking here.
Meet and Greet with Dan Lipinski
Wednesday, January 22nd, 6 PM — 8 PM
Black Horizon Brewing Company
7560 South Quincy Street
Willowbrook, IL 60527
Click here to RSVP by buying a ticket or
come Wednesday and buy a ticket at the door.
AROUND THE DISTRICT
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/2020-01-TInleyPark.jpg]
Thanks to everyone who braved the cold and walked with Dan
at the Tinley Park Parade of Lights!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/2020-01-ArcherHeights.jpg]
Dan enjoyed a great night at St. Richard Parish in Archer Heights
celebrating the Feast of Our Lady of Guadalupe.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/2020-01-19thWard.jpg]
Dan kicked off his New Years Eve playing Bingo with senior residents of the 19th Ward at the Chicago High School for Agricultural Sciences in Mt. Greenwood.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/2020-01-LockportHome.jpg]
Dan appreciated the opportunity to listen to the concerns of the Lockport residents and hardworking Metra employees who attended.
MAJOR ENDORSEMENTS
Building on his reputation as a problem solver who gets things done for the municipalities he represents, Dan welcomed endorsements from 28 mayors covering every region of the District.
Among the mayors and village presidents endorsing the Congressman include La Grange Village President Tom Livingston, Lemont Mayor John Egofske, Oak Lawn Mayor Dr. Sandy Bury, Romeoville Mayor John Noak and Western Springs President Alice Gallagher.
“Congressman Lipinski is a proven leader who continues to deliver for the residents of La Grange and the western suburbs. He has been very responsive and thoughtful in securing critical support for parking improvements, train station modernization, and enhancements to public safety,” said Mayor Livingston.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/2020-01-Endorsed.jpg]
MASS WITH CARDINAL CUPICH
Judy and Dan attended the Spanish Mass at St. Joseph Church in Summit celebrated by Cardinal Blase Cupich. The Cardinal thanked Dan for his 15 years of service in the Third District and they joined parishioners for a reception with the wonderful families of St. Joe’s.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/January-03.jpg]
COMING TO A TRAIN STATION NEAR YOU
Don’t be surprised to run into Dan and his supporters at a train station or community gathering near you. Oak Lawn Mayor Sandra Bury joined Dan on the campaign trail to spread the word about his service in IL03 including his work on local economic development and his service to seniors and veterans.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/January-04.jpg]
JOIN THE TEAM
If you would like to help get the word out about Dan’s work and the fight for the families of IL03 click here to volunteer for the campaign
To stay up to date with the campaign, please follow us on Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.
Thank you!
Team Lipinski

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a7e6dd86-c93b-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f/fb4089c9-553c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQwODljOS01NTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8bcB2-OHFY3kjFO8AhP1NGfmsjyEUNznF_LMUdhg1go=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558
United States

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: The trial begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YuxGW6Hzn3KQJyEjtImz6DsQD5iJAjwSxvT1OvoNPRs=/wtWU-t5CHFMno_t5T5AxyZNG8AfTWoDlY9XfD_bAtlM=)
---
Folks, **Today, the Senate 's impeachment trial against President Donald Trump begins in earnest.** Today is not a political victory or a reason to celebrate. Today is a somber day. It is with a heavy heart that my colleagues in the House and I voted to impeach the President. The President should represent the very best of us -- a public servant dedicated to bettering our country and lifting up its people. But President Trump betrayed the American people and jeopardized our democracy for personal gain. **We already know the facts: The President instituted a quid pro quo relationship with a foreign leader to solicit "dirt" on a political opponent. His political hacks threatened the safety and privacy of an American diplomat. They lied -- to the press, to Congress, and to the American people.** The President cannot and will not be above the law. So as this trial unfolds, let us all remember the ideals at stake: integrity, accountability, democracy, and public trust. **We must do the right thing and impeach, convict, and remove President Trump.** Thank you for standing on the right side of history. Onward. In service, Congressman Al Green | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/YuxGW6Hzn3KQJyEjtImz6DsQD5iJAjwSxvT1OvoNPRs=/SM-bbtuzIQ29STYdblUeRI9UKg4_cyzhtRI6bMqqYH8=?amount=25&refcode=0121-trial)**
---

Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States | Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
---

name: Rita Hart
subject: In the hands of the wealthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g12GxpXO6oto2DsbXVhrM15zsJ112JplzvOG4tkaTI=/IV95tY98gwVhHS0taNjRI8ra3gD2mQ6anlbvMKZxy54=) Peter, today marks 10 years since the Supreme Court's _Citizens United_ ruling, which opened the floodgates for billions of dollars of dark money to flow into our political process. I'm joining with others across the country to call on our leaders in Washington to overturn this disastrous ruling, which allows special interests to sway elections so they can get the policies they want, not the policies that are the best for all of us. **[Let me know if you agree that the _Citizens United_ ruling harmed our democracy by giving too much power and influence to dark money interests.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g12GxpXO6oto2DsbXVhrM15zsJ112JplzvOG4tkaTI=/IV95tY98gwVhHS0taNjRI8ra3gD2mQ6anlbvMKZxy54=)** In the past 10 years, big money has influenced our democracy up and down the ballot in an attempt to swing elections their way and stifle the will of the people. We can't let this continue. It makes it impossible for the voices that really matter, the voices we have to lean in to hear, to be heard over the powerful interests in DC. That's why I believe _Citizens United_ needs to be overturned. I'm so proud to have been endorsed by the group End Citizens United, and I'm happy to stand with them now to share my voice and our voices with people across the country who agree -- dark money has no place in our politics. **[Add your name if you think it's time we overturn _Citizens United_ once and for all and stop the flow of undisclosed money into our politics.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g12GxpXO6oto2DsbXVhrM15zsJ112JplzvOG4tkaTI=/IV95tY98gwVhHS0taNjRI8ra3gD2mQ6anlbvMKZxy54=)** [Click here if you want to overturn _Citizens United_](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g12GxpXO6oto2DsbXVhrM15zsJ112JplzvOG4tkaTI=/IV95tY98gwVhHS0taNjRI8ra3gD2mQ6anlbvMKZxy54=) Thanks for standing with me. Rita Hart **** **** | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/3g12GxpXO6oto2DsbXVhrM15zsJ112JplzvOG4tkaTI=/jrVUmUwfL9hcbCfi3VdpwTDedEdV26e75OFvUG71x5U=?refcode=200121-email)******

clean_body: | | | = Peter, today marks 10 years since the Supreme Court's Citizens United ruling, which opened the floodgates for billions of dollars of dark money to flow into our political process. I'm joining with others across the country to call on our leaders in Washington to overturn this disastrous ruling, which allows special interests to sway elections so they can get the policies they want, not the policies that are the best for all of us. = In the past 10 years, big money has influenced our democracy up and down the ballot in an attempt to swing elections their way and stifle the will of the people. We can't let this continue. It makes it impossible for the voices that really matter, the voices we have to lean in to hear, to be heard over the powerful interests in DC. That's why I believe Citizens United needs to be overturned. I'm so proud to have been endorsed by the group End Citizens United, and I'm happy to stand with them now to share my voice and our voices with people across the country who agree -- dark money has no place in our politics. = = Thanks for standing with me. Rita Hart ** | **Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!** | **** Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. Box 333 Wheatland IA 52777 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. ** ****

Hi there,
Ten years ago, the Supreme Court handed down its ruling in _Citizens United_ , paving the way for corporate special interests to spend unlimited, anonymous money to buy our elections.
One of Senator Hassan's first acts in Congress was to cosponsor a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_.
It's simple -- our democracy should not be for sale to the highest bidder.
The good news is, you can join Senator Hassan and tell Congress to end _Citizens United_ by signing our petition. [**Put your name down now to say that you want to get dark money out of our elections.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc340/2a380d31/22aeee24/f0f99f/3822681301/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstopcitizensunited-jointaction%3Frefcode%3De20201_ecuja_all")
With control of the White House and the future of the Supreme Court at stake in this year's elections, it has never been more important for you to make your voice heard.
[**Please, add your name to tell Congress to end _Citizens United_.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc340/2a380d31/22aeee24/f0f99f/3822681301/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstopcitizensunited-jointaction%3Frefcode%3De20201_ecuja_all")
Thank you,
Team Maggie

And nearly three million times, grassroots donors have felt that optimism and chipped in to this campaign.

body:
Stand with your President before Democrats try to remove him and overturn YOUR vote.
Radical Democrats FALSELY accused YOUR President of betraying his oath and our country.

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: A Supreme Court decision that unleashed unlimited corporate spending on our elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14142358/147905952/-760261259?refcode=em012120-header&refcode2=3e16d194-893c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTE2ZDE5NC04OTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oFaNjWhn_V-_DS2g6rlBFy9n-eaAbmYMnxgVTsLEYw=) **** | | Friend,

10 years ago today, the United States Supreme Court rendered an opinion that ushered in a new era of secretly funded political campaigning — an era that has been deeply harmful to our country.

The _Citizens United_ decision ruled that corporations — like people — are entitled to First Amendment rights, and added the “right” of corporations to make unlimited expenditures to influence the outcomes of elections. Since then, election spending records have been broken in every succeeding year.

I reject that holding. I back up my belief by refusing to accept corporate PAC donations on my campaign. As your next senator, I will support federal legislation that eliminates the negative impact of _Citizens United_ and ensures that our elections are determined by the democratic principle of one person, one vote — not expenditures in the hundreds of millions of dollars from corporate interests.

**My opponent has accepted $2,372,073 in PAC money this election cycle** , and that number will grow. Super PACs working on behalf of Donald Trump and corporate interests are prepared to spend millions on this election, calling Georgia a “tier one” state.

**[I need you to help take on the corporate agenda with a surge of grassroots fundraising to win this race. Make a donation today on the 10th anniversary of the Citizens United decision. It’s going to take gumption, but when we take back the Senate, we WILL reform our campaign finance system to serve us all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14142359/147905953/-760261259?refcode=em012120-b&noskip=true&refcode2=3e16d194-893c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTE2ZDE5NC04OTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-oFaNjWhn_V-_DS2g6rlBFy9n-eaAbmYMnxgVTsLEYw=)** | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friend, 10 years ago today, the United States Supreme Court rendered an opinion that ushered in a new era of secretly funded political campaigning — an era that has been deeply harmful to our country. The Citizens United decision ruled that corporations — like people — are entitled to First Amendment rights, and added the “right” of corporations to make unlimited expenditures to influence the outcomes of elections. Since then, election spending records have been broken in every succeeding year. I reject that holding. I back up my belief by refusing to accept corporate PAC donations on my campaign. As your next senator, I will support federal legislation that eliminates the negative impact of Citizens United and ensures that our elections are determined by the democratic principle of one person, one vote — not expenditures in the hundreds of millions of dollars from corporate interests. My opponent has accepted $2,372,073 in PAC money this election cycle , and that number will grow. Super PACs working on behalf of Donald Trump and corporate interests are prepared to spend millions on this election, calling Georgia a “tier one” state. = | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = Thank you for your support. name: Senator Tina Smith
subject: We are living through an historic time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
My duty to you and our democracy remains the same: To uphold the Constitution and rule of law, and the principle that no one is above the law.

| We are living through an historic time.

When I was sworn into office as your Senator, I took an oath to uphold our Constitution and rule of law. Last fall, after learning about the President's actions to get Ukraine to interfere in our elections for his personal political benefit, I came to the decision that the House should begin impeachment proceedings. We had no choice but to follow the facts, and establish whether the President abused his power and put his own interests ahead of the security of our nation and the rule of law.

The House has impeached the President, and now the Senate begins a trial to determine if he should be removed from office. My duty to you and our democracy remains the same: To uphold the Constitution and rule of law, and the principle that no one is above the law. As a member of the Senate, I swear an oath to "do impartial justice, according to the constitution and the law" and I take this oath seriously. The Senate must hold a fair trial, and that includes witnesses and evidence. Whatever happens, I will fulfill my duty, and make a judgment based on my job as a juror charged with providing impartial justice.

-- Senator Tina Smith
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). | Happy Monday! As I sit down to write to you now, I’m reminded of the emails I sent to my congressman, Kevin McCarthy, begging him to step up to the plate and finally do something.
The thing is Peter, that Donald Trump’s election reminded me that we can’t trust our leaders to do the right thing. We need to hold them accountable.
**And Kevin McCarthy’s demonstrated over and over again that he doesn’t feel accountable to you, me, or anyone else. He defends Trump at every turn, even though he’s a criminal.**
So in my last email to McCarthy, I told him that I would vote for a dog before I voted for him, and immediately looked up who was running against him to see what I could do. He didn’t have a single challenger for 2020 -- so I knew I had to step up to the plate.
[I’m asking you now if you can contribute just $5 to my campaign so we can finally have some real representation in the district I call home. >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14144215/147926605/1066049387?refcode=MAN_EM_FR_200121_AnEmail_U1_X1&amount=5&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTA1NGQxOC05MzNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nStFfOVLWSnyVtApof6fWhS7oAte-IIlBsvSouu-b60=)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: New Ad. New Goal. 48 hours.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We just filmed a great new ad that is going to be game-changing for our campaign in Iowa. BUT we need to have the funds to get it on the air in 2 days.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ) Yang Gang --

We just filmed a new ad designed to break through the noise and separate us from ads Iowans are seeing on their televisions and online every day. And with only 13 days until the Iowa caucuses, we need the funds to get it on the air ASAP.

**That’s why we just set a new public goal of $1 million in 48 hours to get our ad on air in Iowa, and we need you to help us hit it, Yang Gang.

[This is an aggressive goal, so we need you to give $10 or more right now if we’re going to hit it. Hitting this goal and getting this ad on the air is critical to our plans in Iowa.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=5&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)**

We missed our last goal, and it wasn’t a great feeling. We can’t let that happen again.

And this might just be our most important goal yet. Getting a delegate in Iowa will qualify us for the February debates, and I will be able to get our Humanity First message to more voters.

**[So now more than ever, it’s critical we hit our $1 million goal in 48 hours. Dig in deep and help us get our new ad up in Iowa by Friday. Chip in right now:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=6&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=12&amount=25&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)
---
**We can’t do it without you, Yang Gang.**

Let’s do this!

-Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22645?t=13&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=6115%2E377263%2EiKRYjZ) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Texas Battleground HQ
subject: 🚨 early voting in four weeks! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn has big money and powerful special interests. MJ is counting on YOU.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890716/7f51f7bc/4aae839d/4ef00a8a/1634713234/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

---
Hey Peter,

**At this point, it 's clear that this campaign is about the money vs. the many!** Senator John Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest thanks to help from corporate PACs, and his special interest allies are already spending big on ads to help him win re-election. We have just FOUR WEEKS before early voting starts in the Texas primary to build up the resources we need so we can hit the ground running in the general election against Sen. Cornyn!

MJ isn't taking corporate PAC money -- she's relying on this grassroots team every step of the way. And in a battle between the money and the many, **we need to show Sen. Cornyn just how many of us there are![Can you pitch in today?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890716/7f51f7bc/4aae839d/4ef00a8e/1634713234/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-3drive?refcode=email_20200121.1nd__786__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We don't need to match Sen. Cornyn's millions dollar-for-dollar. We just need to raise enough to spread MJ's message and build a Texas-sized grassroots movement. But with early voting in the primary beginning February 18th, we're running out of time!

**Will you pitch in $3 now to help MJ win the Texas primary and BEAT Senator Cornyn?**

name: Team Collins
subject: Elizabeth Warren's latest scheme
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for SenatorClickhere http://links
body:
Yes, you read that headline correctly. Elizabeth Warren’s campaign is using the funds raised from her supporters to target Senator Susan Collins.To unsubscribe click here http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDE1ODg4OTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MTk0MzIxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDE1ODg4OTgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTY4MTk0MzIxNQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Yes, you read that headline correctly. Elizabeth Warren’s campaign is using the funds raised from her supporters to target Senator Susan Collins.

Elizabeth Warren’s campaign is trying to take over the entire political system.
She doesn’t just want to be President, she wants to control the White House, the Senate and the House.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Healthcare freedom is the way forward, not Kendra Horn and big government.
body:
When Washington needs to be getting out of the way Kendra Horn is opposing healthcare freedom for all. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=795c6d9796&u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7eae755f0b)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d596303815&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=c65aa95d6c&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter,
I've been blessed to enjoy many phases in my professional career, but the first one was spending over 24 years in the healthcare industry as a speech pathologist and then as a dentist.

As a dentist, I understood the importance of the doctor-patient relationship. Healthcare works best when individual patients and their families are able to work with doctors to get the care that is right for them.

But that's not the model coming out of Washington. From the stifling one-size-fits-all approach of Obamacare to the disastrous calls for socialized medicine, it seems like Washington thinks they're the solution.

They're not--they're the problem.

In Congress I promise to oppose Democrats like Kendra Horn's attempts to give the federal government even more control over patients’ medical decisions.

Republicans need to be fighting for healthcare freedom, and we can't win without not only a Republican House, but a conservative one.

[**Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us get our message of healthcare freedom to voters and beat Kendra Horn?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1663e3d385&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b528f57949&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| **National Journal says this is the nation's #1 battleground district**

AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020."

Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e81cbff937&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please co ntribute $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us take back the House for conservatives and achieve healthcare freedom for all Oklahomans.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2325593f3b&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=13bc3723d9&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

Friend, **** **** **** We want to share a story with you.
Last week, at a local Democratic committee meeting, a gentleman from Sleepy Hollow came up to our team to let us know that Mondaire had knocked on his door while canvassing the previous weekend. He said that we had not only won his support, but that his wife was so impressed by Mondaire that she printed out a voter registration form and registered as a Democrat so that she could vote for Mondaire in the primary.
This is how we’re going to win this campaign. Door by door, one conversation at a time. The most effective way for us to win over voters is for them to hear directly from Mondaire.
But we still need to raise enough money to make sure that we can fund our campaign through Election Day. And the more money we can raise through emails like this, the more time Mondaire can spend canvassing and talking with voters.

name: Christopher Zook Jr.
subject: Why is Cindy Siegel Running a Negative Campaign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Why is career politician Cindy Siegel running a negative campaign? To hide her record.

From day one, Siegel has been attacking Wesley Hunt because she is career politician who is trying to hide her tax and spend record. And like a typical career politician, Siegel feels entitled and can’t stand that she isn’t being coronated by Republicans in the 7th Congressional District.

**While Cindy Siegel was raising taxes and nearly doubling Bellaire’s budget, Wesley Hunt was serving our country in Iraq and overseas.** Wesley flew 55 combat missions over Iraq in an Apache helicopter, protecting our soldiers and Marines conducting combat operations on the ground.

Cindy Siegel wants you to believe Wesley Hunt isn’t a good Republican because while he was serving in Iraq and overseas, he skipped voting in some elections. She is attacking Wesley for standing with Rush Limbaugh and Republicans all across the country who tried to influence the Democratic primary in 2008.

**What shows more commitment to our country?** Voting in Republican primaries and then turning around and raising taxes like Cindy Siegel, or putting his life on the line for our country in combat like Wesley Hunt?

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Pelosi Knows Impeachment Is Weak
body:
"Compelling, overwhelming and bipartisan: These are the criteria Speaker Nancy Pelosi drew as she publicly announced last March that she wouldn’t..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8d1b7b829&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **_Pelosi Knows Impeachment Is Weak_**

“Compelling, overwhelming and bipartisan: These are the criteria Speaker Nancy Pelosi drew as she publicly announced last March that she wouldn’t support impeachment. Back then she claimed impeaching the president with anything less would be divisive and irresponsible,” Rep. Doug Collins (R-GA) writes in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“Ten months later, however, Mrs. Pelosi has transmitted two articles of impeachment that fail to meet any of her criteria, let alone those of the Founders.”

The facts are clear: The Senate must “reject the temptation of partisan impeachment and expeditiously acquit the president.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c5f4309a8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “As the Senate begins the impeachment trial of President Trump, it faces the challenge not just of weighing the charges, but of trying to rescue the entire process from the low political farce that the House has made of it,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9c3493e42&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| House Democrats’ sham impeachment has been “politics at its worst and opens the door, as some of the Founders warned, for ‘normalizing’ impeachment.” Speaker Pelosi “summed up the true motives of Democrats when she said that regardless of what the Senate does, impeachment will be a ‘permanent stain’ on President Trump’s legacy. In fact, the stain will be on Democrats,” Cal Thomas writes in [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d4c437a750&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| **Stat of the day** : On the heels of President Trump’s historic Phase 1 trade deal with China, and “according to a monthly poll from agricultural trade publication Farm Journal released Sunday, 83% of farmers and ranchers approve of the president’s job performance,” Kirk Maltais reports for [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0199fd8736&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

---

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: Citizens United was decided 10 years ago. Add your name to say you're committed to our fight to overturn it and get dark money out of our politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Ten years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down the Citizens United decision.
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfb0/693b8b0a/4341d2f7/72de7664/1682747327/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Ten years ago today, the Supreme Court handed down the _Citizens United_ decision.
This terrible court ruling unleashed a tsunami of undisclosed, unlimited campaign spending that has since polluted our democracy.
It has never been more important to overturn _Citizens United_. Will you stand with Ed in this fight?
[**If you 're committed to the fight to overturn _Citizens United_ , add your name right now. We must get dark money out of politics and give power back to the people.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfb0/693b8b0a/4341d2f7/72de767b/1682747327/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://markey.bluestatedigital.com/page/signup/markey-overturn-citizens-united?source=em200121-full")
With _Citizens United_ , the court defined money as speech and corporations as people. Since that decision, Super PACs, dark money, and unlimited campaign contributions have weakened our democracy.
Washington corruption will not end so long as we allow corporations to drown out people's voices. Our government is supposed to be about checks and balances, not directed by those writing the biggest checks.
We need a constitutional amendment that will overturn _Citizens United_ and ensure that every person, no matter their wealth, zip code, or socioeconomic background, has an equal say in our democracy.
Today, we must recommit ourselves to fixing our broken campaign finance system once and for all.
[**Add your name to demand a constitutional amendment overturning _Citizens United._ We need you to be part of this fight with us.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfb0/693b8b0a/4341d2f7/72de767b/1682747327/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://markey.bluestatedigital.com/page/signup/markey-overturn-citizens-united?source=em200121-full")
Enough is enough. After a decade of watching _Citizens United_ chip away at our democracy, it's time to put an end to corporations' attempts to buy our government.
Thank you for adding your voice today.
\- Team Markey
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfb0/693b8b0a/4341d2f7/72de767b/1682747327/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://markey.bluestatedigital.com/page/signup/markey-overturn-citizens-united?source=em200121-full")**

* * *

name: J.D.  Scholten
subject: It’s time to end Citizens United
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

10 years ago, the _Citizens United_ decision opened up a flood of untraceable, dark money into our political system.

The wealthiest people and corporations in our country have the power to wield incredible power and influence over our elections -- taking power out of the hands of the many and into the hands of the few.

I’m proud to be running a grassroots campaign, rejecting corporate PAC checks and dark money contributions. I’m also honored to have earned an endorsement from the organization End Citizens United -- they are committed to repealing this decision and reforming our campaign finance system.

**[Join me in taking action -- sign our petition telling our government to end _Citizens United_ today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14146288/147951504/-477823187?ms=em20_200121_citizensunitedpt&refcode=em20_200121_citizensunitedpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmNzc0YS05ZTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIofbvY-8e6YEr3AXhbWo5-T09Ziw4cFbltx4_mv0mA=&emci=5c1c3dd5-8b3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=59ff774a-9e3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)** [SIGN OUR PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14146289/147951505/-477823187?ms=em20_200121_citizensunitedpt&refcode=em20_200121_citizensunitedpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmNzc0YS05ZTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIofbvY-8e6YEr3AXhbWo5-T09Ziw4cFbltx4_mv0mA=&emci=5c1c3dd5-8b3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=59ff774a-9e3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013) We can see the effects of special interests all around us. Oftentimes, the biggest banks and corporations are the ones that reap the most from government policies, rather than the local grocery stores, small businesses or most farms. Prescription drug costs? Just look at how much the pharmaceutical industry pours into elections. It goes on and on.

As a result, politicians (like Steve King) are more accountable to dark money donors than to their voters.

It’s time for concrete reforms to our campaign finance system. The House of Representatives passed H.R. 1 last year, and it’s time to pass it into law. As a Representative, I will be on the forefront of the fight for reform.

**[Add your name to our petition on _Citizens United_ today -- it’s time for action.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14146290/147951506/-477823187?ms=em20_200121_citizensunitedpt&refcode=em20_200121_citizensunitedpt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmNzc0YS05ZTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIofbvY-8e6YEr3AXhbWo5-T09Ziw4cFbltx4_mv0mA=&emci=5c1c3dd5-8b3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=59ff774a-9e3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013)**

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14146291/147951507/-52674191?refcode=em20_200121_citizensunitedpt&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmNzc0YS05ZTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIofbvY-8e6YEr3AXhbWo5-T09Ziw4cFbltx4_mv0mA=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14146292/147951508/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmNzc0YS05ZTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIofbvY-8e6YEr3AXhbWo5-T09Ziw4cFbltx4_mv0mA=&emci=5c1c3dd5-8b3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=59ff774a-9e3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14146293/147951509/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmNzc0YS05ZTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIofbvY-8e6YEr3AXhbWo5-T09Ziw4cFbltx4_mv0mA=&emci=5c1c3dd5-8b3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=59ff774a-9e3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5c1c3dd5-8b3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f/59ff774a-9e3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWZmNzc0YS05ZTNjLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIofbvY-8e6YEr3AXhbWo5-T09Ziw4cFbltx4_mv0mA=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

name: Bruce Sinclair, Campaign Manager
subject: We could have a problem.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Here's where things stand a few weeks into 2020. Our campaign is strong and gaining momentum, and Mark is looking forward to connecting with voters on the campaign trail. But, we could have a problem.
|
---
| | **Republicans are fighting for Virginia.** | **[Donate now to keep Virginia blue](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d68c/53d9897e/53509aad/1c89dfa4/562439800/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-inplaynd?refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_b__431__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
---
Derek,

**Here 's where things stand a few weeks into 2020. **Our campaign is strong and gaining momentum, and Mark is looking forward to connecting with voters on the campaign trail. But, we could have a problem...
> **First --** Donald Trump said Virginia is "in play" in 2020 and he would "be there" to fight for it.
>
> **Then --** His campaign held over 80 events in the Commonwealth.
>
> **NOW -- A battleground state poll shows Donald Trump WINNING Virginia** in several different scenarios. And just last Friday, he tweeted out:
**"Republicans will win Virginia in 2020."**
**We need your help to make sure that doesn 't happen. [Will you donate now so we can build the strong grassroots campaign we'll need to make sure Mark wins in November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d68c/53d9897e/53509aad/1c89dfa3/562439800/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-inplaynd?refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_b__431__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")

We're not trying to cause panic, but it's important to understand that Virginia _isn 't guaranteed_ for Democrats in 2020.** If we want to keep Mark in the Senate and elect other strong Democrats in November, we have to build the largest and most committed grassroots network we've ever had.

**Will you help us build something big by chipping in right now?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d68c/53d9897e/53509aad/1c89dfa1/562439800/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-inplaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_b__431__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d68c/53d9897e/53509aad/1c89dfa0/562439800/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-inplaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_b__431__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d68c/53d9897e/53509aad/1c89dfae/562439800/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-inplaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_b__431__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d68c/53d9897e/53509aad/1c89dfab/562439800/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-inplaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_b__431__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d68c/53d9897e/53509aad/1c89dfaa/562439800/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-inplaynd?express_lane=true&refcode=20200122_f_1_nd_b__431__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**

Bruce

name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: This impeachment trial is a historic moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Today, Michael will step away from the campaign trail to be in Washington, D.C. for the Senate's impeachment trial of Donald Trump.

This trial will be a historic moment for our country, and Michael will fulfill his constitutional duty to serve as an impartial juror in a fair trial. While the trial is in session, Michael will not be doing any fundraising, so we need your help now more than ever.

Our campaign cannot afford to slow down during this impeachment. We've got to be able to walk and chew gum at the same time.

With only three more weeks until the New Hampshire primary, it's crucial that this team steps up to continue fueling Michael's campaign to victory while he's in Washington doing his constitutional duty.

[So here's our ask today: _Will you make a weekly donation to Michael 's presidential campaign through the New Hampshire primary?_](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaba8/134673f2/84c60c2/6997433a/662529482/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfaweekly?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012120_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [DONATE TO MICHAEL >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaba8/134673f2/84c60c2/69974338/662529482/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-impeachment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012120_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thanks for all you do,

Bennet for America

name: MichaelBennet.com
subject: This impeachment trial is a historic moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Today, Michael will step away from the campaign trail to be in Washington, D.C. for the Senate's impeachment trial of Donald Trump.

This trial will be a historic moment for our country, and Michael will fulfill his constitutional duty to serve as an impartial juror in a fair trial. While the trial is in session, Michael will not be doing any fundraising, so we need your help now more than ever.

Our campaign cannot afford to slow down during this impeachment. We've got to be able to walk and chew gum at the same time.

With only three more weeks until the New Hampshire primary, it's crucial that this team steps up to continue fueling Michael's campaign to victory while he's in Washington doing his constitutional duty.

[So here's our ask today: _Will you make a weekly donation to Michael 's presidential campaign through the New Hampshire primary?_](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaba9/134673f2/84d85f5/69974333/4073819170/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfaweekly?refcode=EM_FR_B1_012120_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Sign our petition demanding Washington Republicans allow witnesses and evidence to be presented during the impeachment trial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Folks --

An impeachment trial without witnesses or evidence presented is not a trial at all, it's a sham. Plain and simple.

Yet, Washington Republicans like Senator Cory Gardner, are refusing to uphold the rule of law and do the right thing by taking the impeachment trial seriously and committing to hear from firsthand witnesses.

Even worse, President Trump himself recently raised $100,000 for Gardner as a thank you for having "his back on impeachment."

We need to put the pressure on Gardner and his Republican colleagues to do the right thing here.

Sign our urgent petition today demanding Cory Gardner and his fellow Washington Republicans allow first hand witnesses and evidence in today's impeachment trial of Donald Trump.

https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment

Since this process began, Gardner has been putting his party over Coloradans by condemning the impeachment investigation in an attempt to keep Trump and McConnell happy.

Enough is enough -- and we need your help to hold them accountable, so we can make sure Gardner actually does his job.

Thanks for taking action today.

-- John

https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment
-------

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218

Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.

If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by signing up right here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up

We love staying connected to you—and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you’d like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe. If you'd like to receive only the most important campaign updates, click here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/id-like-to-get-less-email.

If we’re not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information here: https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up

body:

name: Team Lipinski
subject: Come Join Dan for Happy Hour Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dan wants to meet you!

Dan is having a Happy Hour and meet and greet tomorrow (Wednesday) and he wants you to attend. Please join us for what should be a fun event while supporting Dan’s re-election campaign!

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Support for impeachment is dropping!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The Senate impeachment trial is officially in session, but public opinion is turning against Democrats. According to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, support for removing the president dropped below 50%, with those who don't support impeachment rising to 46.3%. The GOP has been trying every tactic to exonerate Trump of all wrongdoing and get back to stuffing the federal bench with unqualified conservative judges, passing more tax cuts for the wealthy, and killing progressive legislation from the House. This new polling could tip the scales and convince wavering Republican Senators to skip calling witnesses and give Trump and McConnell the sham trial they want. We need to hear from you immediately so we can understand in real time where engaged Democrats stand: **Do you support removing Trump from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf92/6e9863e8/17e56b1c/1db058f3/1530571151/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/QlXPJdN3") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf92/6e9863e8/17e56b1c/1db058f3/1530571151/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/QlXPJdN3") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. body:
Friends,
I need your help.

I am still a few hundred signatures short of getting my name on the ballot.

**To be blunt,** **if I come up short of the requirement set by the Arizona Secretary of State, my name will not be on the ballot in November.** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fc0e3a03a95149e1b3df03d2d7de3987&_e=n1-uVfEI-ttXLcwVdcNPejlpDuZhCVVPyQjIpXeeZwDwxEAVts6fe8ow6u2jUKGkxG2EJFxVrOVA-MCX0Av6Tgx9Qxtr9XAv0AYojnDIAWViz-OYVIi4Rd_oTserAc57ybnvegp6YkmysPoxR0yQpQtO-soYFZ-L5u5Qf5Fki7f7mmlI5XYwsq8m8A29m_RUqrGpVKRX7_Yg_sFAvc873elsoFaxr5T901NeuVqwdQvcNRTk8pIeh4t6HbUnScRy-wyE3ViB4XzOA6dBlhJqA13yl8Ka9Gmlg8_FwvPuSgU%3D)** This link goes directly to the Secretary of State’s Official Website and will ask for a driver's license number that will be used to verify voter registration. The SOS only uses this number to verify voter registration and does not keep the number. Friends, I am running to represent Arizona’s First Congressional District because I care about **YOU. **
_As a farmer, attorney and shotgun coach,_ I will represent your values in the United States Congress. [ **MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fc0e3a03a95149e1b3df03d2d7de3987&_e=n1-uVfEI-ttXLcwVdcNPejlpDuZhCVVPyQjIpXeeZwDwxEAVts6fe8ow6u2jUKGkxG2EJFxVrOVA-MCX0Av6Ti-HTANg1OhG7-30mB6PoLSRG27VXqG753VVpPSCeZKGSqGJpCP7ksJkM70sSy7iM20Foh12vKr5HFgH9BMR4Amo2pYyqXuJYWE84woBXT-UWgISy52L9NigzK4WlG5gXeQ5Fh6ad63qlFTwDr_72qj0VS8PZDB9QBQqQnrY0MkCEXtk4ylpRU28dZORCegI5y7HnVilD7OXqDGITJbrlQc%3D) President Trump needs more allies in the House. He is under constant attack from the radical Left.
I will fight for AZ-01 and stand up to Pelosi and her deceitful tactics. [ ** STAND WITH ME ** ](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=fc0e3a03a95149e1b3df03d2d7de3987&_e=n1-uVfEI-ttXLcwVdcNPejlpDuZhCVVPyQjIpXeeZwDwxEAVts6fe8ow6u2jUKGkxG2EJFxVrOVA-MCX0Av6ThRkc7NqkJKbtu7pHYRkUDXId3HrorBm1VRR7QDLjFWqPfy8iRZ18S6uBc5Ao1-lB-OQzLRJlFxCqVbWTHtJdE2ftc8vb6nYYKpueVnefxSmRFH5UkTyOIZwTrhaki2swF__U1MTYGLOLs1RTROrTE4EPF_NIIGMSQkLiHV8a7DNua1dazTh1M35zIKVWE4NsMzhWmO5T--_KbP6rJhVruc%3D) Thank you for making an impact,
Tiffany M. Shedd

| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY4NTYzNDkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTMxOTU0OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Team: Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell just released his proposed rules for President Trump's impeachment.
Since the first day of his presidency, Trump has gotten away with one corrupt act after another. Now that impeachment has reached the Senate, we have a chance to finally hold him accountable. But it won't happen if Democrats don't speak up.
**With Donald Trump 's Senate trial starting TODAY, we need to know where grassroots Democrats stand. We're conducting a time-sensitive impeachment poll in 34223 - but we're still 17 responses short, and we haven't heard from you yet. **
**Tell us before midnight: **
| | **11:59 P.M. DEADLINE**

**Should President Trump be removed from office?**

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: FOR SALE: Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited)
---
Folks, Today marks 10 years since _Citizens United_ put our democracy up for sale. Certain PACs continue to pour infinite and untraceable amounts of money into our elections, propping up some politicians who vote in the best interest of their donors -- NOT their voters. The way we finance our elections plays a foundational role in the types of leaders we elect. **That 's why I refuse to accept money from certain PACs and oppose untraceable dark money-- because my allegiance is and always has been to the people of Texas' 9th district.** **But to be honest, it's hard to keep up with the ever-growing power and influence of dark money. My campaign relies heavily on grassroots supporters like you to spread our message, support progressive causes, and turn out the vote.** [**On this infamous anniversary, can you spare a few dollars to support my re-election campaign, so I can keep working for meaningful change for Americans like you?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited&express_lane=true&amount=10) | [DONATE $20](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited&express_lane=true&amount=20)
---|---
[DONATE $35](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited&express_lane=true&amount=35) | [DONATE $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited&express_lane=true&amount=50)
[DONATE $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited&express_lane=true&amount=100) | [Other amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited)
Refusing big money isn't easy, but it's the right thing to do -- and I know this grassroots movement will support me in working to uphold our democracy. Thanks for all you do.
In solidarity,
Congressman Al Green
**[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/573-yZaeuMRWnpeNMqADUGyOU8h0yQz32zG2Fb8N5ec=/9-2s0E7RdRdhNW7wA_X-eHjBWO5wVf0cWNGaWnHZg8g=?refcode=0121-citizensunited)**

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: The People's Pledge is still waiting for Ed Markey.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902e7/55b66746/2db4dd50/80f9200/2369739995/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Today marks exactly ten years since the Supreme Court handed down its _Citizens United_ decision. It was a step backward for our whole country. Since then, the special interests have wreaked havoc on our elections, spending billions to consolidate their power and drown out the voices of working Americans. **That's why, since the day I kicked off my campaign, I've called on Senator Ed Markey to take the People's Pledge, to make sure the voters - not outside special interests and dark money - drive this election.** No Super PACs, no independent expenditures, no DC campaign committees, no party apparatuses, no interest groups - just individual donations from real people. Ed Markey has declined to sign the People's Pledge to keep dark money out of this election. We need to stand together to show him we reject dark money. We must make it clear that it's not enough for Democrats to talk about values - we need put them in action. **[Make a contribution now to fuel our people-driven campaign. Together we must fight for a clean, transparent election funded by _people_ - not special interests. ](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363902e7/55b66746/2db4dd50/80f9201/2369739995/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-01-21-citizens-united-peoples-pledge&refcode2=today&recurring=1&amount=3")** No more dark money in our politics. Since then, the special interests have wreaked havoc on our elections, spending billions to consolidate their power and drown out the voices of working Americans. That's why, since the day I kicked off my campaign, I've called on Senator Ed Markey to take the People's Pledge, to make sure the voters - not outside special interests and dark money - drive this election. No Super PACs, no independent expenditures, no DC campaign committees, no party apparatuses, no interest groups - just individual donations from real people. Ed Markey has declined to sign the People's Pledge to keep dark money out of this election. We need to stand together to show him we reject dark money. We must make it clear that it's not enough for Democrats to talk about values - we need put them in action. "" No more dark money in our politics. "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? "". This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; "". If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, "" Questions or concerns? "". |

name: Wendy Davis
subject: Your opinion on the impeachment trial:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
With everything going on, I want to know where you stand.
| | | [](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk63-su-nd")
---
Friend: For only the third time in our nation's history, a presidential impeachment trial is underway in the Senate. Each U.S. senator took a solemn oath to serve as an impartial juror as they consider convicting Donald Trump of high crimes and misdemeanors.
**But to execute the role of impartial juror, the Senate must receive full evidence of the president 's behavior.** Sadly, Mitch McConnell is turning his back on the oath he swore - and turning his back on our Constitution - by not allowing for new witness testimony.
Is denying the American people the full truth really the standard for a fair and impartial trial? Moments like these test our country's character - and right now, Mitch McConnell is failing. **I don 't want my grandbabies to grow up in a world where their leaders take the easy way out - and that's why, together, we must demand better from the Senate.**
**I 'm counting on 2,700 supporters - including you - to make your voices heard on the impeachment trial before midnight. Speak out against Mitch McConnell by answering the following question:**
| | **Should the Senate allow witness testimony in the impeachment trial?**
---
| | | [YES](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk63-su-nd")
---
| [NO](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-impeachment_survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk63-su-nd")
---
Thank you,

Wendy
| If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can **[click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ad6/704929dc/161c773b/39938db3/1733992512/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter")**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ad6/704929dc/161c773b/39938db2/1733992512/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails"). [To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ad6/704929dc/161c773b/39938db5/1733992512/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe") | Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: Unite the Country
subject: Our new ad is on the air in Iowa (watch!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
Today we released our latest TV ad supporting Joe Biden for president!
The new ad, called "The Storm," reminds voters that Joe Biden knows how to make government work. If Joe is elected president, he's promised to do whatever is necessary to make progress on the issues that matter most like civil liberties, national security, and climate change.
**Watch our new ad, then please share it with your friends.**
[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662a6/4017922362/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://pic.twitter.com/uVgJlPRaOW")
**[SHARE ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662a7/4017922362/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/609948416232735/")** **[SHARE ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662a0/4017922362/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://pic.twitter.com/uVgJlPRaOW")**
As a U.S. Senator and Vice President, Joe has worked across the aisle to reach consensus. He took on the NRA - twice - and won. He helped pass the Brady Bill, establishing a background check system and secured the passage of a 10-year assault weapon bill. He introduced one of the first pieces of legislation to address climate change. Joe is trusted and respected by world leaders and will rebuild relationships with our allies. He has the experience and is ready on day one to be commander-in-chief.
Joe Biden has shown the courage needed to do the right thing, even when it's politically risky. Joe's steady leadership will help us weather this storm and unite the country.
Onward,
Unite the Country
**[WATCH THE AD](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662a7/4017922362/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/UniteTheCountryPAC/videos/609948416232735/")**

[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662a1/4017922362/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662a2/4017922362/VEsA/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/unitecountrypac") [](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662a3/4017922362/VEsB/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.instagram.com/unitethecountry/")
* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662ac/4017922362/VEsO/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're counting on supporters like you, but if you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76a4/287b9173/2b05d54b/7e7662ad/4017922362/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

* * *
I was the first black mayor of a city in Montana, and I’m honored to have that distinction. But that didn’t happen overnight. When I first came to America, I was so inspired by this country and its promise of hope that I enlisted in the National Guard. After serving my country in the armed forces for 22 years, I knew my life of service wasn’t over, so I ran for mayor. **[I won by running an honest campaign based around listening to the people and addressing their concerns. Politics really can be that simple. Now, I want to take this story of hope and of community action to the Senate. But that didn’t happen overnight. When I first came to America, I was so inspired by this country and its promise of hope that I enlisted in the National Guard. After serving my country in the armed forces for 22 years, I knew my life of service wasn’t over, so I ran for mayor. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Pelosi proves critics on both sides WRONG again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In the weeks since the House impeached Trump, John Bolton has come forward to offer testimony to the Senate. Lev Parnas, Giuliani's close associate, handed over damning evidence further implicating the president and senior administration members in the Ukraine scandal, in addition to giving a ground-breaking interview. If Speaker Pelosi hadn't waited, McConnell's Senate could have pushed through a dismissal of charges or a sham trial before these new facts came to light. With the new evidence, GOP senators are finally breaking from their party leader, and we may actually get to hear from crucial witnesses. Speaker Pelosi is leading the charge against Republican obstruction and abuse of power, but she can't be the only one. Engaged Democrats across the country need to have her back as we head into the next election. We need to hear from you today: **Do you support Nancy Pelosi?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf94/6e9863e8/17e6ba5e/1db05b9d/2074318711/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/YhHfW_jd") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf94/6e9863e8/17e6ba5e/1db05b9d/2074318711/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/YhHfW_jd") Thank you, The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf94/6e9863e8/17e6ba5e/1db05b9d/2074318711/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/YhHfW_jd")
