name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm no stranger to tough fights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
When I made the decision to run my presidential campaign the right way -- without spending my time sucking up to rich donors and asking them for donations at closed-door fundraisers -- some cynics... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a64c/45c30650/1e31c829d/66fe9bc1/3558242079/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
**Reaching 3 million donations before Iowa would be a powerful statement about the strength of our movement. Elizabeth is counting on you to help get there:**
**[Make a contribution of any amount right now.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a64c/45c30650/1e31c829d/66fe9bc2/3558242079/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xR0ZfM01DX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMTIxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1GF_3MC_EWD_E_20200121_V1S2_P")** I'm no stranger to tough fights.

When I went to Washington to talk about my idea for a government agency to protect consumers from financial scams, I kept hearing the same thing over and over again: Great idea, but it'll never happen. The big banks and their armies of lobbyists won't let it become law.

**But we got organized, we built a grassroots movement, and fought back -- and created the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.**

When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, I started out 17 points down from the popular Republican incumbent who had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street. I was told "a woman can't win here."

**But then we did -- by 7.5 points.**

And when I made the decision to run my presidential campaign the right way -- without spending my time sucking up to rich donors and asking them for donations at closed-door fundraisers -- some cynics said that our campaign would struggle to raise the money we need.

**But we've proved them wrong. And today, our campaign has received over 2.9 million contributions and three million is within reach.**

This will be a huge milestone for our grassroots movement -- and I'm grateful to every single person (like you) who has helped grow the movement we have today.

**[We're close to reaching this goal, and every contribution helps. If it makes sense, I'd be deeply grateful if you would make your first contribution today and help our campaign hit this next goal.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a64c/45c30650/1e31c829d/66fe9bc2/3558242079/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xR0ZfM01DX0VXRF9FXzIwMjAwMTIxX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1GF_3MC_EWD_E_20200121_V1S2_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Plenty of people will be quick to tell you what you can't do or what you shouldn't fight for. But it takes hope and courage to make real change -- and that's what we've done, and will continue to do, together.

I'm so grateful to have you in this fight.

clean_body: When I made the decision to run my presidential campaign the right way -- without spending my time sucking up to rich donors and asking them for donations at closed-door fundraisers -- some cynics... | | | "" Reaching 3 million donations before Iowa would be a powerful statement about the strength of our movement. Elizabeth is counting on you to help get there: "" I'm no stranger to tough fights. When I went to Washington to talk about my idea for a government agency to protect consumers from financial scams, I kept hearing the same thing over and over again: Great idea, but it'll never happen. The big banks and their armies of lobbyists won't let it become law. But we got organized, we built a grassroots movement, and fought back -- and created the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. When I first ran for the U.S. Senate, I started out 17 points down from the popular Republican incumbent who had truckfulls of campaign cash from Wall Street. I was told "a woman can't win here." But then we did -- by 7.5 points. And when I made the decision to run my presidential campaign the right way -- without spending my time sucking up to rich donors and asking them for donations at closed-door fundraisers -- some cynics said that our campaign would struggle to raise the money we need. But we've proved them wrong. And today, our campaign has received over 2.9 million contributions and three million is within reach. This will be a huge milestone for our grassroots movement -- and I'm grateful to every single person (like you) who has helped grow the movement we have today. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Plenty of people will be quick to tell you what you can't do or what you shouldn't fight for. But it takes hope and courage to make real change -- and that's what we've done, and will continue to do, together. I'm so grateful to have you in this fight. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2020 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:

| Dear Friend,

[**Our President needs our help!**](https://orttforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=6dc3a71a9d&e=9f843ba602)

Today marks another sad chapter in Congressional Democrats’ sad leadership as the Senate began its impeachment trial of President Trump.

>From the moment our President won on Election Night 2016, radical regressives and their accomplices in the media have sought to overturn and overthrow his Presidency.

The impeachment is nothing but the latest attempt to delegitimize the millions who support President Trump and love our country.

[**We cannot allow the socialist progressives to win.**](https://orttforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=cb986857d3&e=9f843ba602)

[**We need to fight back.**](https://orttforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=32cf1d8516&e=9f843ba602)

We’re asking for your help to [**stand with President Trump**](https://orttforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=208e3bdfe7&e=9f843ba602) when he needs us most. His presidency and our country are at stake!

Thank you and God Bless.
Rob

I’m happy to share with you some very exciting news... the Scheller for Congress campaign will be opening up an official HQ – Ground Zero in the fight for our conservative values and principles.
I want to invite you to be part of the celebration!
**Please join us for a grand opening party on January 27th at 6:30 p.m.**
We’ll celebrate the next big milestone for our race, as we toast to all of the big wins to come.
But that’s not all - while we’re busy celebrating, we’ll also be busy getting on the ballot. We need your help to gather and process the signatures that will make us the official Republican nominee.
